title: Information Security Incident Response Standard & Procedure (PDF)
display_label: Information Security Incident Response Standard & Procedure
content: Information Security Incident Response Standard & Procedure for Morgan State University. Provides a structured framework for identifying, managing, and responding to information security incidents. Primary goal: minimize the potential impact on the university's information assets while ensuring the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of critical systems and data. Part of MSU's Research Security Program (cybersecurity pillar). Hosted on Google Drive. Linked from the Research Security Information Technology Resources page.
